scenarios.reason: Agent can evaluate provided HCL file contents against the four checklist items (include blocks, named includes, root file naming, environment configs) without running any tools.
Agent can identify missing mock_outputs and incorrect mock_outputs_allowed_terraform_commands from provided HCL file contents.

scenarios.capability: Security checklist: state encryption, locking, and hardcoded credentials
scenarios.reason: Agent can audit provided HCL for missing encrypt=true, missing DynamoDB locking, and hardcoded credential patterns without executing any tools.

scenarios.capability: Deprecated syntax and Terragrunt 0.93+ migration issues
scenarios.reason: Agent can identify deprecated commands, attributes, and naming conventions from provided HCL content and recommend modern replacements.

scenarios.capability: Full validation report with all four checklists completed
scenarios.reason: Agent can produce a comprehensive validation report with pass/fail status for all checklist items from a set of provided HCL files.
